member.name: T:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.SecurityLevel
member.summary: Security level for KAZ-SIGN operations

member.name: F:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.SecurityLevel.Level128
member.summary: 128-bit security (SHA-256)

member.name: F:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.SecurityLevel.Level192
member.summary: 192-bit security (SHA-384)

member.name: F:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.SecurityLevel.Level256
member.summary: 256-bit security (SHA-512)

member.name: T:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.KazSignError
member.summary: Error codes returned by KAZ-SIGN operations

member.name: F:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.KazSignError.Success
member.summary: Operation successful

member.name: F:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.KazSignError.MemoryError
member.summary: Memory allocation failed

member.name: F:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.KazSignError.RngError
member.summary: Random number generation failed

member.name: F:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.KazSignError.InvalidParameter
member.summary: Invalid parameter

member.name: F:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.KazSignError.VerificationFailed
member.summary: Signature verification failed

member.name: F:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.KazSignError.DerError
member.summary: DER encoding/decoding failed

member.name: F:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.KazSignError.X509Error
member.summary: X.509 certificate operation failed

member.name: F:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.KazSignError.P12Error
member.summary: PKCS#12 operation failed

member.name: F:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.KazSignError.HashError
member.summary: Hash operation failed

member.name: F:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.KazSignError.BufferError
member.summary: Buffer too small

member.name: T:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.KazSignParameters
member.summary: Parameters for each security level Note: Size constants must be kept in sync with include/kaz/sign.h

member.name: M:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.KazSignParameters.GetSecretKeyBytes(Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.SecurityLevel)
member.summary: Get secret key size in bytes for the given security level (s || t)

member.name: M:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.KazSignParameters.GetPublicKeyBytes(Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.SecurityLevel)
member.summary: Get public key size in bytes for the given security level (v)

member.name: M:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.KazSignParameters.GetSignatureOverhead(Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.SecurityLevel)
member.summary: Get signature overhead in bytes for the given security level
member.remarks: Values must match KAZ_SIGN_SIGNATURE_OVERHEAD in kaz/sign.h. Signature = S1 || S2 || S3 (3 equal-size components)

member.name: M:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.KazSignParameters.GetHashBytes(Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.SecurityLevel)
member.summary: Get hash output size in bytes for the given security level

member.name: T:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.NativeMethods
member.summary: Native P/Invoke declarations for KAZ-SIGN library

member.name: M:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.NativeMethods.InitLevel(System.Int32)
member.summary: Initialize the library for a specific security level. Can be called multiple times with different levels.

member.name: M:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.NativeMethods.ClearLevel(System.Int32)
member.summary: Clear resources for a specific security level.

member.name: M:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.NativeMethods.ClearAll
member.summary: Clear resources for all security levels.

member.name: M:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.NativeMethods.KeyPairEx(System.Int32,System.Byte[],System.Byte[])
member.summary: Generate a key pair for a specific security level.

member.name: M:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.NativeMethods.SignEx(System.Int32,System.Byte[],System.UInt64@,System.Byte[],System.UInt64,System.Byte[])
member.summary: Sign a message with a specific security level.

member.name: M:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.NativeMethods.VerifyEx(System.Int32,System.Byte[],System.UInt64@,System.Byte[],System.UInt64,System.Byte[])
member.summary: Verify a signature with a specific security level.

member.name: M:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.NativeMethods.HashEx(System.Int32,System.Byte[],System.UInt64,System.Byte[])
member.summary: Hash a message with the hash function for a specific security level.

member.name: M:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.NativeMethods.DetachedSigBytes(System.Int32)
member.summary: Get the detached signature size for a security level.

member.name: M:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.NativeMethods.DetachedEx(System.Int32,System.Byte[],System.UInt64@,System.Byte[],System.UInt64,System.Byte[])
member.summary: Create a detached signature (signature does not include the message).

member.name: M:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.NativeMethods.VerifyDetachedEx(System.Int32,System.Byte[],System.UInt64,System.Byte[],System.UInt64,System.Byte[])
member.summary: Verify a detached signature.

member.name: M:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.NativeMethods.Sha3_256(System.Byte[],System.UInt64,System.Byte[])
member.summary: Compute SHA-256 hash of a message in one shot.

member.name: M:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.NativeMethods.PubKeyToDer(System.Int32,System.Byte[],System.Byte[],System.UInt64@)
member.summary: Encode a public key to DER format.

member.name: M:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.NativeMethods.PubKeyFromDer(System.Int32,System.Byte[],System.UInt64,System.Byte[])
member.summary: Decode a public key from DER format.

member.name: M:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.NativeMethods.PrivKeyToDer(System.Int32,System.Byte[],System.Byte[],System.UInt64@)
member.summary: Encode a private key to DER format.

member.name: M:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.NativeMethods.PrivKeyFromDer(System.Int32,System.Byte[],System.UInt64,System.Byte[])
member.summary: Decode a private key from DER format.

member.name: M:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.NativeMethods.GenerateCsr(System.Int32,System.Byte[],System.Byte[],System.String,System.Byte[],System.UInt64@)
member.summary: Generate a PKCS#10 Certificate Signing Request (CSR).

member.name: M:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.NativeMethods.VerifyCsr(System.Int32,System.Byte[],System.UInt64)
member.summary: Verify a PKCS#10 CSR self-signature.

member.name: M:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.NativeMethods.IssueCertificate(System.Int32,System.Byte[],System.Byte[],System.String,System.Byte[],System.UInt64,System.UInt64,System.Int32,System.Byte[],System.UInt64@)
member.summary: Issue an X.509 certificate by signing a CSR.

member.name: M:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.NativeMethods.CertExtractPubKey(System.Int32,System.Byte[],System.UInt64,System.Byte[])
member.summary: Extract the public key from an X.509 certificate.

member.name: M:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.NativeMethods.VerifyCertificate(System.Int32,System.Byte[],System.UInt64,System.Byte[])
member.summary: Verify an X.509 certificate signature against an issuer public key.

member.name: M:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.NativeMethods.CreateP12(System.Int32,System.Byte[],System.Byte[],System.Byte[],System.UInt64,System.String,System.String,System.Byte[],System.UInt64@)
member.summary: Create a PKCS#12 keystore containing a key pair and optional certificate.

member.name: M:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.NativeMethods.LoadP12(System.Int32,System.Byte[],System.UInt64,System.String,System.Byte[],System.Byte[],System.Byte[],System.UInt64@)
member.summary: Load a key pair and certificate from a PKCS#12 keystore.

member.name: T:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.KazSignException
member.summary: Exception thrown when a KAZ-SIGN operation fails

member.name: P:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.KazSignException.ErrorCode
member.summary: The error code returned by the native library

member.name: T:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.P12Contents
member.summary: Contents loaded from a PKCS#12 keystore

member.name: P:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.P12Contents.SecretKey
member.summary: Secret signing key

member.name: P:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.P12Contents.PublicKey
member.summary: Public verification key

member.name: P:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.P12Contents.Certificate
member.summary: DER-encoded certificate, or null if not present

member.name: T:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.KazSigner
member.summary: KAZ-SIGN digital signature operations with runtime security level selection.

member.name: M:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.KazSigner.#ctor(Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.SecurityLevel,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Create a new KazSigner with the specified security level.
member.param: If true, automatically initialize for this level

member.name: P:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.KazSigner.Level
member.summary: The security level being used

member.name: P:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.KazSigner.SecretKeyBytes
member.summary: Size of secret key in bytes

member.name: P:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.KazSigner.PublicKeyBytes
member.summary: Size of public key in bytes

member.name: P:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.KazSigner.SignatureOverhead
member.summary: Signature overhead in bytes (excluding message)

member.name: P:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.KazSigner.HashBytes
member.summary: Hash output size in bytes

member.name: M:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.KazSigner.Initialize
member.summary: Initialize the library for this security level.

member.name: M:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.KazSigner.IsInitialized
member.summary: Check if the library is initialized for this level.

member.name: M:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.KazSigner.GenerateKeyPair(System.Byte[]@,System.Byte[]@)
member.summary: Generate a new key pair.

member.name: M:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.KazSigner.Sign(System.Byte[],System.Byte[])
member.summary: Sign a message.

member.name: M:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.KazSigner.Verify(System.Byte[],System.Byte[],System.Byte[]@)
member.summary: Verify a signature and extract the message.
member.returns: True if signature is valid, false otherwise

member.name: M:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.KazSigner.Hash(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Hash a message using the appropriate hash function for this security level.

member.name: M:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.KazSigner.SignDetached(System.Byte[],System.Byte[])
member.summary: Create a detached signature (signature does not include the message).

member.name: M:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.KazSigner.VerifyDetached(System.Byte[],System.Byte[],System.Byte[])
member.summary: Verify a detached signature.
member.returns: True if signature is valid, false otherwise

member.name: M:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.KazSigner.Sha3_256(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Compute SHA-256 hash of data.

member.name: M:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.KazSigner.PublicKeyToDer(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Encode a public key to DER format.

member.name: M:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.KazSigner.PublicKeyFromDer(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Decode a public key from DER format.

member.name: M:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.KazSigner.PrivateKeyToDer(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Encode a private key to DER format.

member.name: M:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.KazSigner.PrivateKeyFromDer(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Decode a private key from DER format.

member.name: M:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.KazSigner.GenerateCsr(System.Byte[],System.Byte[],System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Generate a PKCS#10 Certificate Signing Request (CSR).
member.param: Organizational Unit (OU), or null to omit

member.name: M:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.KazSigner.VerifyCsr(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Verify a PKCS#10 CSR self-signature.
member.returns: True if the CSR signature is valid, false otherwise

member.name: M:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.KazSigner.IssueCertificate(System.Byte[],System.Byte[],System.String,System.Byte[],System.UInt64,System.Int32)
member.summary: Issue an X.509 certificate by signing a CSR.

member.name: M:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.KazSigner.VerifyCertificate(System.Byte[],System.Byte[])
member.summary: Verify an X.509 certificate signature against an issuer public key.
member.returns: True if the certificate signature is valid, false otherwise

member.name: M:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.KazSigner.ExtractPublicKey(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Extract the public key from an X.509 certificate.

member.name: M:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.KazSigner.CreateP12(System.Byte[],System.Byte[],System.Byte[],System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Create a PKCS#12 keystore containing a key pair and optional certificate.
member.param: Friendly name for the key entry

member.name: M:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.KazSigner.LoadP12(System.Byte[],System.String)
member.summary: Load a key pair and certificate from a PKCS#12 keystore.
member.returns: Loaded key pair and optional certificate

member.name: M:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.KazSigner.GetVersion
member.summary: Get the library version string.

member.name: M:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.KazSigner.GetVersionNumber
member.summary: Get the library version number.

member.name: M:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.KazSigner.Dispose
member.summary: Clear resources for this security level.

member.name: M:Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.KazSigner.ClearAll
member.summary: Clear all security level resources. Call when completely done with KAZ-SIGN.
